reviews.review_description: If I could get out of the pay thing I think it would be a good game but it sucks because I can’t.

This app has a really fun arcade mode, and the drop shot practice is very realistic (when working). Seems there was a glitch with the last updates over the summer and fall, that should be resolved shortly. Looking forward to it working again. The new Badminton Coach app has a lot more capability than this one. If it's not functioning properly, try back in a week or so!
I Actually thought a free batmenton game came out but it’s just not good I hope they improve it

1) Only right handed racket available. Please develop a left handed racket with the left controller.
2) For the game on the court, allow for player to center in a location where they can hit the shuttlecock. I could not reach the shuttlecock unless I walked outside of my guardian.
3) Bad saber - quite fun to practice hits. But shuttlecocks often times appear larger than real life. The background is a bit dizzying, would be nice to have a stationary background like a badminton court.
4) is there a discord server for this game for feedback to developers?

Thank you for developing this game, have been waiting for a badminton vr game for a while!
